reviews.review_description: Ok tad confused is this just a room to play n w friends? Hopeing I missed something cause says was priced as 9.99 but on sale for .99 so tried to it out for that and let me just say if paid9.99 I would definitely be refunded caus literally less then a min I spent on one level. Thought it would b mor puzzle type escape room or locating the batteries was all u were supposed to do caus that pretty much took me 30 seconds and after found them that was it ?? Like I said, maybe i missed something or there’s mor to it or hope so😒 will change stars to mor caus it was cute characters and smooth controls but had to ask caus Ihav missed things n the past befor in games when I was a nooby to my quest so wanted to clear that up quik 🤔 but if it’s just a sandbox type game and multiplayer gorilla tag type game to hav fun w friends, then it’s right up ypur alley, but if u think if u r a play solo type escape room player like I qm, even for .99 u wil want refund I caus no puzzles,period 😬 will update if I get any feed bk or I did miss something myself 🧐
